philosophy: Measure what matters. Focus on player experience and business health, not vanity metrics. Privacy-first - minimal data collection, anonymized where possible.

acquisition.target: 50% of guests convert to registered within 7 days

activation.target: 80% of new players complete first battle within 5 minutes

reporting.daily: Active players, new registrations, revenue, critical errors
reporting.weekly: Retention cohorts, feature usage, battle balance metrics
reporting.monthly: LTV analysis, churn reasons, roadmap prioritization data

privacy.data_minimization: Collect only what's needed for game function and analytics
privacy.anonymization: Hash player IDs in external analytics, no PII in event logs
privacy.retention: Raw events: 90 days, Aggregated: indefinite, Personal: until account deletion
privacy.consent: Analytics consent separate from essential function consent
